item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config_mode = json.loads((root / 'config/onboarding.json').read_text())['mode']
doc = (root / 'docs/onboarding.md').read_text()
prose_mode = re.search(r'"'^Run ('"\\S+) onboarding', doc, re.M).group(1)
example_mode = re.search(r'--mode\\s+(\\S+)', doc).group(1)
print(f'config_mode={config_mode}')
print(f'docs_prose_mode={prose_mode}')
print(f'docs_example_mode={example_mode}')
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config_mode = json.loads((root / 'config/onboarding.json').read_text())['mode']

example_mode = re.search(r'--mode\\s+(\\S+)', doc).group(1)
print(f'config_mode={config_mode}')
print(f'docs_prose_mode={prose_mode}')
print(f'docs_example_mode={example_mode}')
PY"
